subject: Python hiring velocity after your Series B
body:
Hi Priya,

Nimbus Ledger Inc. closed a $14,000,000 Series B on 2026-02-12 — and your public Python roles reached 7 out of 11 open engineering roles, a change of 8 over 60 days. The typical bottleneck at this stage is recruiting capacity rather than budget.

Three companies at similar stage & stack closed this gap with a dedicated squad — 30 minutes next week to share how it went?

— Tenacious

subject: preserving delivery capacity post-restructure
body:
Hi Marcus,

Tenacious has helped two mid-market teams preserve delivery throughput through restructures — net output within 95% CI of pre-RIF baseline by week 9. Not a cost-cutting pitch, a capacity-preservation pitch.

Worth 30 minutes?

— Tenacious

subject: welcome to Aurelia Health — quick resource
body:
Hi Daniela,

Congrats on the new role. Most new engineering leaders reassess offshore/vendor mix in the first 6 months; happy to send a short note on how peers have approached it if useful.

— Tenacious

subject: quick note on your AI platform work
body:
Hi Hiroshi,

Saw the public signal on your ML platform direction. We recently shipped a similar project for a peer — happy to compare architecture notes over 30 minutes.

— Tenacious

Nimbus Ledger Inc. closed a $14,000,000 Series B on 2026-02-12 — and your public Python roles reached 7 out of 11 open engineering roles, a change of 8 over 60 days. The typical bottleneck at this stage is recruiting capacity rather than budget.

Three companies at similar stage & stack closed this gap with a dedicated squad — 30 minutes next week to share how it went?

— Tenacious

subject: preserving delivery capacity post-restructure
body:
Hi Marcus,

Tenacious has helped two mid-market teams preserve delivery throughput through restructures — net output within 95% CI of pre-RIF baseline by week 9. Not a cost-cutting pitch, a capacity-preservation pitch.

Worth 30 minutes?

— Tenacious

Nimbus Ledger Inc. closed a $14,000,000 Series B on 2026-02-12 — and your public Python roles reached 7 out of 11 open engineering roles, a change of 8 over 60 days. The typical bottleneck at this stage is recruiting capacity rather than budget.

Three companies at similar stage & stack closed this gap with a dedicated squad — 30 minutes next week to share how it went?

— Tenacious

subject: preserving delivery capacity post-restructure
body:
Hi Marcus,

Tenacious has helped two mid-market teams preserve delivery throughput through restructures — net output within 95% CI of pre-RIF baseline by week 9. Not a cost-cutting pitch, a capacity-preservation pitch.

Worth 30 minutes?

— Tenacious

subject: welcome to Aurelia Health — quick resource
body:
Hi Daniela,

Congrats on the new role. Most new engineering leaders reassess offshore/vendor mix in the first 6 months; happy to send a short note on how peers have approached it if useful.

— Tenacious
